mapper.sql:
system_id , menu_id
, menu_nm , url , new_window , parent_menu_id , sort_order , remark , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt

WITH RECURSIVE cmmt_menu_hierarchy AS ( SELECT
, 1 AS LEVEL , ARRAY['1'||LPAD(CAST(cm.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0')] AS PATH , false AS CYCLE FROM cmmt_menu cm WHERE cm.system_id = #{systemId} AND ${whereMenu} UNION ALL SELECT
, cm1.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL , cm1.PATH||CAST((cm1.LEVEL + 1) AS TEXT)||LPAD(CAST(cm2.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0') AS PATH , CAST((cm1.LEVEL + 1) AS TEXT)||LPAD(CAST(cm2.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0') = ANY(PATH) AS CYCLE FROM cmmt_menu_hierarchy cm1 JOIN cmmt_menu cm2 ON cm1.system_id = cm2.system_id AND cm2.parent_menu_id = cm1.menu_id WHERE cm1.system_id = #{systemId} AND NOT CYCLE )

WITH RECURSIVE cmmt_menu_reverse_hierarchy AS ( SELECT
, 1 AS LEVEL , ARRAY['1'||LPAD(CAST(cm.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0')] AS PATH , false AS CYCLE FROM cmmt_menu cm WHERE cm.system_id = #{systemId} AND cm.menu_id = #{menuId} UNION ALL SELECT
, cm1.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL , CAST((cm1.LEVEL + 1) AS TEXT)||LPAD(CAST(cm2.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0')||cm1.PATH AS PATH , CAST((cm1.LEVEL + 1) AS TEXT)||LPAD(CAST(cm2.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0') = ANY(PATH) AS CYCLE FROM cmmt_menu_reverse_hierarchy cm1 JOIN cmmt_menu cm2 ON cm1.system_id = cm2.system_id AND cm2.menu_id = cm1.parent_menu_id WHERE cm1.system_id = #{systemId} AND NOT CYCLE )

WITH RECURSIVE cmmt_menu_by_role AS ( SELECT
FROM cmmt_menu cm WHERE cm.system_id = #{systemId} AND cm.menu_id in ( select a.menu_id from cmmt_menu a left join cmmt_menu b on a.system_id = b.system_id and a.menu_id = b.parent_menu_id where a.system_id = #{systemId} and a.menu_id in ( select menu_id from cmmt_menu_role where system_id = #{systemId} and ${whereRole} ) and b.menu_id is null ) UNION ALL SELECT
FROM cmmt_menu_by_role cm1 JOIN cmmt_menu cm2 ON cm1.system_id = cm2.system_id AND cm2.menu_id = cm1.parent_menu_id WHERE cm1.system_id = #{systemId} ) , cmmt_menu_hierarchy as ( SELECT
, 1 AS LEVEL , ARRAY['1'||LPAD(CAST(cm.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0')] AS PATH , false AS CYCLE FROM (select distinct * from cmmt_menu_by_role) cm WHERE cm.system_id = #{systemId} AND cm.parent_menu_id = 'ROOT' UNION ALL SELECT
, cm1.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL , cm1.PATH||CAST((cm1.LEVEL + 1) AS TEXT)||LPAD(CAST(cm2.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0') AS PATH , CAST((cm1.LEVEL + 1) AS TEXT)||LPAD(CAST(cm2.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0') = ANY(PATH) AS CYCLE FROM cmmt_menu_hierarchy cm1 JOIN (select distinct * from cmmt_menu_by_role) cm2 ON cm1.system_id = cm2.system_id AND cm2.parent_menu_id = cm1.menu_id WHERE cm1.system_id = #{systemId} AND NOT CYCLE )

WITH RECURSIVE cmmt_menu_by_role AS ( SELECT
FROM cmmt_menu cm WHERE cm.system_id = #{systemId} AND cm.menu_id in ( select a.menu_id from cmmt_menu a left join cmmt_menu b on a.system_id = b.system_id and a.menu_id = b.parent_menu_id where a.system_id = #{systemId} and a.menu_id in ( select menu_id from cmmt_menu_role where system_id = #{systemId} and ${whereRole} ) and b.menu_id is null ) UNION ALL SELECT
FROM cmmt_menu_by_role cm1 JOIN cmmt_menu cm2 ON cm1.system_id = cm2.system_id AND cm2.menu_id = cm1.parent_menu_id WHERE cm1.system_id = #{systemId} ) , cmmt_menu_hierarchy as ( SELECT
, case when um.menu_id is null then false else true end as read_yn , 1 AS LEVEL , ARRAY['1'||LPAD(CAST(cm.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0')] AS PATH , false AS CYCLE FROM cmmt_menu cm left join (select distinct * from cmmt_menu_by_role) um on cm.system_id = um.system_id and cm.menu_id = um.menu_id WHERE cm.system_id = #{systemId} AND cm.parent_menu_id = 'ROOT' UNION ALL SELECT
, case when um.menu_id is null then false else true end as read_yn , cm1.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL , cm1.PATH||CAST((cm1.LEVEL + 1) AS TEXT)||LPAD(CAST(cm2.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0') AS PATH , CAST((cm1.LEVEL + 1) AS TEXT)||LPAD(CAST(cm2.sort_order AS TEXT), 3, '0') = ANY(PATH) AS CYCLE FROM cmmt_menu_hierarchy cm1 JOIN cmmt_menu cm2 ON cm1.system_id = cm2.system_id AND cm2.parent_menu_id = cm1.menu_id left join (select distinct * from cmmt_menu_by_role) um on cm1.system_id = um.system_id and cm1.menu_id = um.menu_id WHERE cm1.system_id = #{systemId} AND NOT CYCLE )
mapper.select:
/** CmmtMenuDao.selectList_authorityId */
select menu_id , menu_nm , url , new_window , parent_menu_id , sort_order , read_yn FROM cmmt_menu_hierarchy ORDER BY PATH

/** CmmtMenuDao.selectList_roleId */
select menu_id , menu_nm , url , new_window , parent_menu_id , sort_order , read_yn FROM cmmt_menu_hierarchy ORDER BY PATH

/** CmmtMenuDao.selectParentForChild */
SELECT system_id , menu_id , lpad(' ', ((SELECT MAX(LEVEL) AS max_lvl FROM cmmt_menu_reverse_hierarchy) - LEVEL))||menu_nm AS menu_nm , url , new_window , parent_menu_id , sort_order , remark , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt FROM cmmt_menu_reverse_hierarchy ORDER BY PATH DESC
